privileged_info_summary: The task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new software license from scratch. Verified the expected software license attributes (name 'Adobe Creative Cloud - All Apps', count 25, key 'ACCA-2024-CORP-7891-XYZW', purchase date '2024-11-15', expiry date '2025-11-14', cost 14997, manufacturer 'Adobe', and type 'Volume') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the database validation logic.
